body_txt: May overlap with Hero-Worshipper and Heroic Wannabe . Also a common cause (and effect) of Poser Hating . If this continues for too long, it can turn into I Just Want to Be You , with the difference being that this trope is usually a temporary state of affairs and generally Played for Laughs . If a character's style becomes a widespread new fashion craze, that's You Are the New Trend . Sub-Trope of Adopted Mannerisms . Sister Trope of Admiration-Based Mimicry , a characterization trope where a character's admiration of another is expressed through copying their gesture/habits, though not with the same deliberation as this trope. See also Sincerest Form of Flattery , which is a meta-trope about Word of God admitting to copying from an earlier influence on their work. Contrast Copycat Mockery where the irritation is definitely intentional. Compare/contrast Envy-Based Mimicry for when the imitation is done out of envy, though the envied party might express irritation.
